ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "cough" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of cough (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "runny_nose" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of runny nose (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "fever" INTEGER /* Patient's recorded fever temperature */,
  "tightness_of_chest" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of chest tightness (-1=not checked, 1=yes) */,
  "breathing_problem" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of breathing problems (-1=not checked, 1=yes) */,
  "headache" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of headache (-1=not checked, 1=yes) */,
  "pneumonia" INTEGER /* Indicates pneumonia status (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "travelling_in_last_15days" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient traveled in last 15 days (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "victims" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is a victim (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., smoker, non-smoker, former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient (e.g., non-drinker, light drinker, heavy drinker) */,
  "cough_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of cough in days */,
  "fever_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of fever in days */,
  "symptom_onset_date" TEXT /* Date when symptoms first appeared */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of symptoms (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "travel_destination" TEXT /* Destination of travel */,
  "travel_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of travel */,
  "travel_end_date" TEXT /* End date of travel */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel (e.g., work, vacation, family) */,
  "preexisting_conditions" TEXT /* Preexisting medical conditions (e.g., asthma, diabetes, heart disease) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated, not vaccinated) */,
  "hospitalization_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was hospitalized (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "hospitalization_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of hospitalization in days */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received (e.g., medication, oxygen therapy) */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was entered */,
  "data_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user who can view the data (e.g., public, healthcare provider, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each patient record
Indicates presence of chest tightness (-1=not checked, 1=yes)
Indicates presence of breathing problems (-1=not checked, 1=yes)
Indicates if the patient traveled in last 15 days (0=no, 1=yes)
Indicates if the patient is a victim (0=no, 1=yes)
Date of birth of the patient
Smoking status of the patient (e.g., smoker, non-smoker, former smoker)
Alcohol consumption status of the patient (e.g., non-drinker, light drinker, heavy drinker)
Severity of symptoms (e.g., mild, moderate, severe)
Reason for travel (e.g., work, vacation, family)
Preexisting medical conditions (e.g., asthma, diabetes, heart disease)
Vaccination status (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated, not vaccinated)
Indicates if the patient was hospitalized (0=no, 1=yes)
ID of the user who entered the data
Timestamp when the data was entered
Access level of the user who can view the data (e.g., public, healthcare provider, admin)
